name: Midjourney
description: Midjourney remains the gold standard for AI image generation. Its V6 engine produces photorealistic images with exceptional detail and coherent text rendering. The Discord-based interface has a learning curve, but the community is incredibly active and helpful. Perfect for concept art, marketing visuals, and creative exploration.

name: Framer
tagline: Design and publish sites in minutes
description: Framer is a professional design tool that lets you build production-ready websites directly from your canvas. Its AI features help generate layouts, copy, and responsive designs. The affiliate program is generous, and the tool is genuinely loved by designers making the leap from Figma to live sites.

name: Remove.bg
description: Remove.bg uses AI to detect subjects and remove backgrounds in seconds. It is the most reliable tool for this specific task, with excellent edge detection on hair and fur. The free tier is generous for low-volume use, and the API is rock-solid for integrations. A must-have for any designer's toolkit.

name: Looka
description: Looka generates professional logos and brand kits based on your preferences. You pick styles, colors, and symbols, and the AI generates dozens of options. The brand kit add-on includes social media templates, business card designs, and brand guidelines. Great for startups and side projects that need a brand identity fast.

name: Magician
description: Magician is a Figma plugin that brings AI directly into your design workflow. It can generate icons, copy, and images from text prompts without leaving your canvas. For designers who live in Figma, this removes the friction of switching between tools. The icon generation is particularly impressive for quickly mocking up UI elements.

name: Canva
description: Canva's Magic Studio brings AI to the world's most popular design platform. Magic Write generates copy, Magic Edit transforms images, and Magic Design creates entire presentations from a prompt. It's the best choice for non-designers and marketers who need to create professional visuals quickly without a steep learning curve.

name: DALL-E 3
description: DALL-E 3 is OpenAI's most advanced image generation model, available through ChatGPT Plus and the API. It excels at understanding complex prompts with multiple objects and relationships. The integration with ChatGPT makes it incredibly accessible for anyone already using the platform. The quality rivals Midjourney with better prompt adherence.

name: Uizard
description: Uizard turns sketches and text prompts into editable UI designs. Upload a hand-drawn wireframe or describe your app, and Uizard generates a full mockup. It's perfect for rapid prototyping and ideation. The design-to-code export is particularly useful for developers who want to skip the design phase.

name: Runway ML
description: Runway ML is the leading AI video editing platform. Gen-3 generates high-quality video from text and images, while Motion Brush lets you animate specific parts of an image. It's essential for video creators, motion designers, and anyone exploring AI-generated video content. The quality improvements with each generation are remarkable.

name: Adobe Firefly
description: Adobe Firefly is the only AI image generator trained on Adobe Stock and public domain content, making it commercially safe. Integrated into Photoshop, Illustrator, and Express, it lets you generate, extend, and fill images non-destructively. For designers working with corporate clients, Firefly's legal safety is a major selling point.

name: Figma AI
description: Figma AI brings generative features directly into the design tool you already use. Auto-layout suggestions, AI-generated images, and first-draft designs from prompts are now built-in. As a native feature, it understands your design system and components better than any plugin. Essential for teams already in the Figma ecosystem.

name: Gamma
description: Gamma creates beautiful presentations, documents, and websites from a single text prompt. The AI handles layout, typography, and visual design so you can focus on content. The one-page scroll format is modern and engaging. Perfect for pitch decks, portfolios, and quick documentation that needs to look polished.

name: Clipdrop
description: Clipdrop by Stability AI provides a suite of AI image editing tools including relighting, upscaling, background removal, and generative fill. The API-first approach makes it perfect for developers and designers building AI-powered products. The quality is excellent and the pricing is more competitive than many alternatives.

name: Spline
description: Spline makes 3D design accessible to everyone with AI-powered features that generate textures, animate objects, and convert 2D to 3D. The web-based editor requires no installation and the real-time collaboration is excellent. Perfect for UI designers who want to add 3D elements to their work without learning Blender.

name: Stable Diffusion
description: Stable Diffusion is the open-source AI image model that powers countless tools and workflows. Run it locally for unlimited, free generation, or use it through various platforms. SDXL and the newer SD3 models offer quality comparable to proprietary alternatives. For privacy-conscious designers and those who want full control, local Stable Diffusion is unbeatable.
